role: Core configuration settings and architectural governance rules that define scanning, hooks, artifact strategy, and naming conventions for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Collectively, these components establish the operational parameters (scanning policies, hook integration, artifact distribution, initialization state) and structural constraints (layered architecture rules, naming conventions) that enable the ArchSpine system to maintain repository consistency and enforce codebase discipline across agent contexts.

children.role: Core configuration for the ArchSpine repository mirror system, governing scanning policies, ignore chains, hook integration, artifact strategy, and initialization state to maintain repository consistency and agent context.
Defines the architectural governance rules and naming conventions that enforce consistency and layering in ArchSpine-governed codebases.
